background: An instrument which consists of $k$ units operates for a time $t$. The reliability of each unit during the time $t$ is $p$. When the time $t$ passes, the instrument stops functioning, a technician inspects it and replaces the units that failed. He needs a time $s$ to replace one unit.

task.query: Find the probability that in the time $2 s$ after the stop the instrument will be ready for work.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
事件发生概率及独立性
